role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and climate cues (pinyon-juniper, calcareous soil).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Juniperus, Pinus edulis) and biome characteristics.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the USA as the location. The specialist agents provided high-quality, domain-specific evidence (particularly landscape and botanics) that accurately described the visual features. The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish the USA from the closest analog (Mexico) and other candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rocky soil, patchy snow, and tree types match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification (Juniper/Pinyon) is consistent with the visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Trekker blur description matches the bottom of the frame.
